title: rubus × semibellardii
intro: Rubus × semibellardii, also known as the Semibellard raspberry or the hybrid raspberry, is a cross between the fragaria and rubus plant species. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of digestive issues, due to its high content of anthocyanins, which have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Rubus × semibellardii include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. The plant is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or powder, and is also used in jams and preserves, showcasing its versatility in herbal preparations.
